title: Tennessee Republicans eliminate majority-Black district
shortDescription: The move follows a Supreme Court ruling removing Voting Rights Act protections for majority-minority districts.

title: White House slams Mark Hamill over Trump tombstone post
shortDescription: The White House condemned Star Wars actor Mark Hamill as a "sick individual" for a social media post he made about Trump that he later deleted.

title: Trump rips $1,000 World Cup ticket prices
shortDescription: U.S. President Donald Trump criticized the high cost of 2026 World Cup tickets, telling the New York Post that he "wouldn't pay it either."

title: Texas House Republicans rally behind Arrington's border resolution
shortDescription: Every Texas House Republican has signed on to Rep. Jodey Arrington's resolution declaring southern border states were "invaded" under Biden.

title: See Trump news, updates and schedule from the Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: President Trump unveiled new UFC fight renderings. Marco Rubio is meeting with the pope. Trump renewed Iran threats. Trump news rundown for May 7.

title: Melania Trump interrupted by laughter after mentioning husband's empathy
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump and President Donald Trump hosted a military mothers event. As she spoke of her husband's empathy, audience members laughed.

title: Celebrities Donald Trump has pardoned
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has granted pardons, often sparking controversy and public debate, to a number of celebrities during his time in office.

title: Melania Trump remarks on president's 'empathy'
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump spoke at a Military Mother's Day event, praising President Donald Trump's empathy.

title: Who's on Texas 2026 GOP, Democratic primary runoff ballot in May?
shortDescription: Texans head to the polls for primary runoff elections in May 2026, deciding key statewide party races for U.S. Senate, Lt. Governor, and Attorney General.

title: Fewer Americans think Trump keeps his promise in approval rating poll
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating poll has been underwater for a year. But a Pew Research Center poll shows views of his personal traits are dropping.

title: UK voters cast ballots in elections expected to deal blow to Starmer
shortDescription: Millions of British voters cast their ballots on in local and regional elections that are expected to deal a huge blow to PM Keir Starmer's Labour Party.

title: Trump squashed GOP dissenters in Indiana. Who's next?
shortDescription: Trump endorsed challengers to beat fellow Republicans he contends were disloyal in Kentucky, Louisiana and Georgia.

title: Trump administration can keep ballots seized in Georgia, judge rules
shortDescription: Atlanta-based U.S. District Judge J.P. Boulee rejected Fulton County’s request for return of original copies of materials seized during FBI search.
